selections.name: Tengun Tommy
selections.reason: Impressive winner of his last two starts, including a dominant win at Sunshine Coast. Gollan stable is flying.

selections.name: My Girl Marley
selections.reason: Consistent filly with two consecutive runner-up finishes. Drawn ideally to get a soft run.

selections.name: Cascading
selections.reason: Excellent debut fourth at Gold Coast and followed it up with another solid fourth at Sunshine Coast. Big upside.

selections.name: Hidden Whisper
selections.reason: Resumes here after a debut win at this track. Trialed well and has plenty of speed.

danger_horse.name: My Girl Marley
danger_horse.reason: Ready to win and gets the perfect run from barrier 4.

selections.name: Moonan Quartz
selections.reason: In superb form with back-to-back wins at Sunshine Coast and Eagle Farm. Hard to hold out.

selections.name: Tornado Express
selections.reason: Strong winner last start at Sunshine Coast. Drawn beautifully and handles the soft conditions well.

selections.name: Detrimental
selections.reason: Solid third last start at Gold Coast. Fitter second-up and has excellent tactical speed.

selections.name: Puff 'N' Harry
selections.reason: Tough winner two starts back and followed it up with a solid third. Must be respected.

danger_horse.name: Tornado Express
danger_horse.reason: Main danger coming off a career-best rating performance.

selections.name: Moshulu Spirit
selections.reason: Chasing a four-timer. Outstanding win at Ipswich last start and loves the soft going.

selections.name: Fire Bomber
selections.reason: Excellent second last start at this track in open company. Drawn to get a perfect trail.

selections.name: Venom Rush
selections.reason: Impressive winner two starts back and followed it up with a solid fifth. Can overcome the wide gate.

selections.name: Point Vega
selections.reason: Disappointed last start but previous form was excellent. Worth another chance.

danger_horse.name: Fire Bomber
danger_horse.reason: Strong speed figures last start make him the logical threat.

selections.name: Stranglehold
selections.reason: Chasing a hat-trick after two dominant wins at Gold Coast and Ipswich. Hard to beat.

selections.name: Techna
selections.reason: Outstanding 4-length winner last start at Eagle Farm. Drawn to get the run of the race.

selections.name: Demarcay (GB)
selections.reason: Narrowly beaten last start at Beaudesert. Consistent stayer who will be in the finish.

selections.name: Connecticut
selections.reason: Solid third last start at Gold Coast. Very fit and handles the distance well.

danger_horse.name: Techna
danger_horse.reason: Huge win last start and represents the primary danger.

selections.name: Dragonne Rouge
selections.reason: Excellent third two starts back at Gold Coast in stakes company. Class drop suits.

selections.name: Spirit Of Barty
selections.reason: Strong second last start at Sunshine Coast. Handles the soft track perfectly.

selections.name: Grinzinger Champ
selections.reason: Fitter second-up after a solid fourth at Eagle Farm. Rates highly.

selections.name: Stein
selections.reason: Consistent filly who was a close third last start at Eagle Farm. Each-way chance.

danger_horse.name: Spirit Of Barty
danger_horse.reason: In great form and the soft track is a major plus.

selections.name: John Rambo
selections.reason: Class runner of the field. Excellent efforts in stakes company recently. Hard to beat.

selections.name: Robrick
selections.reason: Strong winner last start at Ipswich. Loves the soft track and is in peak form.

selections.name: North Pole
selections.reason: Impressive winner two starts back at Gold Coast. Handles the conditions well.

selections.name: Bluepinot
selections.reason: Disappointed last start but previous win at this track was outstanding. Can bounce back.

danger_horse.name: Robrick
danger_horse.reason: In career-best form and looms as the main threat.

selections.name: Taltarni Fields
selections.reason: Fitter second-up. Classy gelding who has an excellent record at this track.

selections.name: She's Exotic
selections.reason: Consistent mare with excellent form in similar company. Handles the soft track.

selections.name: Break Free
selections.reason: Strong third last start at Sunshine Coast. Winner at this track two starts back.

selections.name: Too Many Thoughts
selections.reason: Resumes here. Classy individual who has trialed well leading into this.

danger_horse.name: She's Exotic
danger_horse.reason: Rates highly on recent speed figures and handles the soft going.

selections.name: Esjay
selections.reason: Excellent third last start in stakes company at Ipswich. Class drop is significant.

selections.name: The Inflictor
selections.reason: Classy individual who was close up in G2 company two starts back. Major player.

selections.name: Express Payment
selections.reason: In superb form with two wins from his last three starts. Loves the mile.

selections.name: Warby
selections.reason: Consistent performer who was a close third two starts back. Each-way hope.

danger_horse.name: The Inflictor
danger_horse.reason: Class drop makes him a massive threat to the top selection.

selections.name: Daggers
selections.reason: Excellent third last start at Ipswich. Outstanding winner at Gold Coast prior. Hard to beat.

selections.name: High Dandy (NZ)
selections.reason: Fitter second-up after a narrow second at Eagle Farm. Drawn to get the gun run.

selections.name: Pasima
selections.reason: Consistent performer who will appreciate the drop in class. Strong each-way claims.

selections.name: Sosino (IRE)
selections.reason: Strong winner two starts back and followed it up with a solid fourth. Rates well.

danger_horse.name: High Dandy (NZ)
danger_horse.reason: Perfect draw and excellent second-up record make him the main danger.
